description: PDF extraction manifest for the three MDPI Polymers papers in the source map. Each entry specifies what to extract (Table 3 only for Practice 3), which pages to inspect, how many records are expected, and what columns the target table is known to contain.

tools.fallback_table: Camelot (lattice or stream depending on whether the PDF has visible cell borders)
tools.rendering: PyMuPDF page.get_pixmap() at zoom=2 for visual verification crops

targets.measurement_conditions: DSC at 10 °C/min, heating to 300 °C, cooling to 40 °C, reheating; N₂ flow 50 mL/min. PPO® SA90 is a commercial reference, not synthesized in the study.
targets.page_hint: Page 6-7 of the article PDF (Results section 3.1.3 and 3.2). Table 3 sits near the DSC discussion and Figure 6 (DSC heating curves).

targets.measurement_conditions: DSC Q2000 (TA Instruments) at 10 °C/min under N₂ in the range 50–400 °C. BTD-FND Tg is reported as not numerically determinable (>350 °C, close to T_d onset).
targets.page_hint: Page 6 of the article PDF (Results section 3.2 Thermal Analysis), between the TGA thermograms and the density discussion.
known_quality_flags: BTD-FND Tg is qualitative (>350 °C) and must be stored with tg_value=null and a flag in notes; do NOT silently coerce to 350.0.

targets.measurement_conditions: DMA Q800 (TA Instruments) in tensile mode at 5 °C/min and 1 Hz under N₂; Tg taken as the tanδ peak temperature.
targets.page_hint: Page 8-9 of the article PDF (Results section 3.2 Thermal Properties), near Figures 6 (TGA) and 7 (DMA).
known_quality_flags: User-provided task brief says 'Table 3 — 6 records'. The paper text mentions Table 3 (TGA/DMA/TMA combined) and also Table 4 (DMA + optical) for Tg; both tables contain Tg values from the same DMA tanδ experiment. Use Table 3 as the primary source as instructed; if Table 4 disagrees, log a row in extraction_log.jsonl and prefer Table 3.
